svg.title: Cassette 800 V DC primary electrical schematic
svg.desc: Single-line diagram showing platform 800 V DC source through Staubli CombiTac 2500 connectors at the ELEC ECP, laminated copper bus bar to main disconnect, SPD and Bender IMD, revenue meter, 4000 A busway, fifteen 200 A branch breakers to racks R1 through R15 with Delta power shelves, and the single-point ground reference.
svg.text: Cassette 800 V DC primary — single-line schematic
Platform source → ELEC ECP → main bus → 15 branch circuits. Rev 2.1 corrections applied.

g.text: Trips on E-stop or IMD < 1 kΩ
800 V DC busway — 4,000 A (Starline or equivalent)
~15 m floor-mount ladder run · enables CPX upgrade per ELEC-001 §13
Bus current: 1,981 A NVL72 · 2,631 A CPX

svg.text: 15 × busway tap → 250 A frame / 200 A trip MCCB (800 V DC rated) → 2× 70 mm² branch
Delta in-rack power shelves (per compute rack):
800 V DC + and − are NOT bonded to SPG (ungrounded IT per IEC 61557-8)
Racks, CDU, tray, panels, ECP covers all bond to SPG bar
Resistance target: Cassette frame to platform SPG ≤ 1 Ω
